title: Hylotelephium scherfelii
intro: Hylotelephium scherfelii, also known as a species of stonecrop, is a perennial succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as wounds, burns, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Hylotelephium scherfelii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, the plant is often used to make topical preparations, such as creams, ointments, and salves, as well as teas and infusions, which are believed to promote wound healing and soothe digestive issues.
